overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a vehicle driving through Night City on a foggy night. The journey transitions from a highway with billboards to dense urban streets with neon signage, stopping at a traffic light, and continuing through covered pedestrian walkways.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily through heavy fog on the highway, following the vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane maintaining distance through the fog

entered.detail: large colorful digital advertising screens lining the left side of the highway
highway gantry signs with directional arrows indicating routes
tall street lights casting diffuse light through the fog

segments.scene_description: Driving on a multi-lane highway through heavy fog. Colorful billboards line the left side while overhead signs indicate directions. Street lamps cast diffuse light through the mist as the vehicle follows traffic ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown commercial street with neon signage

events.description: exits highway and enters dense urban downtown with tall buildings and neon signs
approaches intersection and stops at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: navigating city streets lined with palm trees and slowing to stop at the red light

entered.detail: tall building with prominent green and pink neon signage reading Ganymede
red illuminated sign on building facade
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from highway to dense urban streets lined with palm trees and towering buildings. Neon signs including 'Ganymede' illuminate the foggy atmosphere as the vehicle approaches an intersection and stops at a red traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection under overpass with medical facility

events.description: traffic light turns green and vehicle accelerates through intersection
passes under concrete overpass entering semi-covered area beneath MedCenter building

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the green light and driving under the overpass past the medical center

notable_agents.action: pedestrians waiting at crosswalk as the car passes through the intersection

entered.detail: large brutalist concrete building with red cross symbol and MedCenter signage
massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates as the light turns green, passing beneath a massive concrete overpass. The MedCenter building dominates the right side with its distinctive red cross signage. The environment becomes more enclosed as the car drives through the underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian transit corridor with shops

agents.ego_description: driving slowly through the covered walkway with pedestrians visible on both sidewalks

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the covered sidewalk on the left

entered.detail: long fluorescent light strips running continuously along the ceiling of the covered walkway
green paved sidewalks on both sides of the road with pedestrians walking
red V-shaped gang symbol painted on the wall indicating Valentinos territory

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered pedestrian corridor illuminated by long overhead fluorescent lights. Pedestrians walk along the green sidewalks on both sides while shop fronts line the walls. The Valentinos gang logo is visible on the right wall as the car proceeds slowly through the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a foggy metropolis that transitions from an open highway into a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins on a multi-lane highway where diffuse street lamps and colorful billboards pierce through heavy mist. As the vehicle leaves the highway, the scene shifts into dense urban streets lined with palm trees and towering buildings, where neon signs like Ganymede illuminate the fog before the car comes to a halt at a red traffic light. The vehicle then accelerates beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing the red cross signage of the MedCenter as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed. Finally, the camera glides into a covered pedestrian corridor under long fluorescent lights, passing green sidewalks and the Valentinos gang logo on the walls.
